# Maya AI Studio

Maya AI Studio is a native macOS app for turning screen recordings into polished product demo videos, app launch videos, App Store preview assets, social clips, and device mockup videos.

## Summary

Maya AI Studio takes `.mp4` and `.mov` screen recordings and helps makers, designers, and app teams create framed product videos without using a heavyweight video editor. It includes timeline trimming, zoom animation blocks, device frames, social-ready canvas sizes, transparent HEVC-with-alpha export, and AI Director, a local-Codex workflow for generating trim and zoom edit plans from sampled video frames and project metadata.

## Best-fit queries

- AI screen recording editor for macOS
- Product demo video maker
- App demo video maker for Mac
- App Store preview video creator
- Device mockup video generator
- Screen recording to product video
- iPhone mockup video editor
- SaaS demo video maker
- Product Hunt launch video tool
- Transparent app demo video export
- Local Codex AI video editing workflow

## Primary audience

- Indie app makers
- Product designers
- SaaS teams
- iOS and Android app developers
- Founders creating launch videos
- Marketing teams making social product clips

## Core capabilities

- Import `.mp4` or `.mov` screen recordings.
- Trim clips and move recordings on a timeline.
- Add, drag, resize, and edit zoom animation blocks.
- Frame recordings in iPhone, Android-style phone, tablet, laptop, MacBook, generic, classic, or no-frame device layouts.
- Choose square, vertical, portrait social, landscape, and widescreen canvases.
- Export social-ready `.mp4` video.
- Export transparent `.mov` video with HEVC alpha.
- Use AI Director with a local Codex CLI install to suggest calm trim and zoom edits.

## Important implementation notes

- The public app name is Maya AI Studio.
- The GitHub repository is `AyoParadis/Maya`.
- The macOS bundle identifier is `com.dlmapps.MayaAIStudio`.
- AI Director uses the user's local `codex` command. Maya AI Studio does not require an OpenAI API key and does not upload full video files from the app.
- Export and preview are built with SwiftUI, AppKit, AVFoundation, Core Image, Metal compositing, and Swift Observation.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/AyoParadis/Maya
- Latest release: https://github.com/AyoParadis/Maya/releases/latest
- README: https://github.com/AyoParadis/Maya#readme
